calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Brian S. Healy, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital Access Group, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Dave Simmons was placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Peter Boo Chan and Hung Ming Enterprises, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages $97,3964.11
Prejudgment Interest $172,538.93
Costs $565.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $1,147,068.04
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
